sources.title: Samsung Unveils ‘Design Is an Act of Love’ Exhibition at Milan Design Week 2026
sources.excerpt: Samsung Electronics today announced the opening of its “Design is an Act of Love” exhibition at Milan Design Week 2026. Structured across 12 immersive zones in the Samsung Design Open Lab at Superstudio Più in Milan from April 20-26, the exhibition marks a new chapter in the company’s evolving design vision by offering perspectives on how design can respond to evolving human needs and behaviors.
